project_info.tagline: Your clinic's front desk, on autopilot — 24/7

motion.waveform_animation: framer-motion driven oscillating SVG paths using brand colors

hero.visual: Abstract waveform animation mimicking voice/breathing, built with framer-motion SVG or layered colored divs (Terracotta & Sage).

marquee.content: Logos of integrations (Jane App, WebPT, Clinicient) simulated with typography + Lucide icons if SVGs absent.

problem_solution.layout: Sticky left column (Problem), scrolling right column (Solution cards)
problem_solution.style: Generous padding, high contrast between columns

how_it_works.style: Large serif numbers, clean icons, border-l on desktop

features_bento.layout: CSS Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3) using Tetris Grid logic
features_bento.style: Card flat surface, soft shadows, inner padding p-8

faq.style: Flat background, border-b only, text-lg questions

image_urls.description: Warm modern medical clinic reception, to be used in 'Solution' or 'How it Works' section.
Female physiotherapist assisting patient, use in Testimonials or Features.
Personal trainer assisting amputee in rehab, use in Testimonials.
Smartphone calendar app, use in the 'Direct Booking' feature card.

instructions_to_main_agent: DO NOT use generic UI layouts. Rely heavily on generous padding (p-8 to p-16) inside containers.
Implement the waveform animation in the hero using framer-motion and SVG paths. Make it feel organic and breathing, using the brand teal, orange, and green colors.
Ensure the hero overlay text remains readable. Use textual shadows or subtle gradient masks behind the text if necessary.
For the Problem/Solution section, make 'The Problem' sticky on the left while 'The Solution' cards scroll on the right.
Use 'react-fast-marquee' for the clinic PMS integration logos. Pair the brand names with Lucide icons to simulate real software logos.
Ensure all buttons have distinct hover states (lighter hue of the background color) and include 'data-testid' attributes.
The typography must feature 'Cormorant Garamond' for headings (giving an organic, trusted, high-end medical feel) and 'Manrope' for body copy.
Apply the 'card_flat' surface strategy to feature boxes. Avoid 'Vercel-style' borders; use extremely subtle 1px border (#121C1A at 5% opacity).
Never use raw images without responsive constraints (max-h-[80vh] for mobile).
